Description: Secure login via Firebase Authentication using email and password.
Register new users and assign role (Student/Teacher).
Forgot password functionality sending reset link to email.
Update personal information and upload profile picture via Cloudinary.
Create new courses with titles, descriptions and materials.
Dashboard view showing all classes a student is enrolled in.
View organized classes by semester and time.
View detailed course information including syllabus and participant lists.
Create exams setting constraints (time limits) and adding questions manually or via Excel.
Modify existing exams before they are published.
Access and complete exams within the allocated time limit with auto-save.
Generate reports detailing student scores, correct answers and feedback.
Display aggregated statistics for courses such as average scores and completion rates.
Define, open and close academic semesters.
Centralized view to monitor system activity and manage user roles.
In-app alerts for new exams, grades or system announcements.
